description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and build. In the test stage add a test job that uses the python:3.6-alpine3.7 image, runs pip install -r requirements.txt, then pip install flake8, and finally executes flake8, and is tagged with docker. In the build stage add a build job that uses the docker:git image with a docker:dind service, runs sh docker/build.sh, and is also tagged with docker. Use the default image python:3.6-alpine3.7 for jobs unless overridden, and configure no caches, artifacts, or special rules.
